resources.rdfs:label: D8 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D6 to D8. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

resources.rdfs:label: D10 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D8 to D10. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

resources.rdfs:label: D12 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D10 to D12. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

resources.rdfs:label: Weapon Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with a weapon type

resources.rdfs:label: Save Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 save.
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

resources.rdfs:label: Skill proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 skill
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 1 xp for each additional time taken

resources.rdfs:label: Increased ability
sa:description: Increase the maximum ability for one of your abilities by 2 up to a maximum of 24.
Increase the same ability by 2 up to your maximum ability modifier.
Can be taken several times, costs increase by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

resources.rdfs:label: Ace pilot
sa:description: Select one specific aircraft or spacecraft. Add your proficiency bonus twice on pilot checks made using the chosen aircraft.
You can choose a new aircraft or spacecraft for this feature by spending at least 1 week flying it and only it.

resources.rdfs:label: Great Captain
sa:description: Spending your action to make a Charisma(Leadership) check lets a single member of your crew gain advantage on a single skill check, save or attack using your ship depending on your result. For example your pilot can gain advantage on his pilot check and your gunner gain advantage on his weapon systems attack rolls. If your crew members do not make a roll you can give advantage on by the start of your next turn the ability is wasted.

Alternatively you can cause an attack targeting your ship to gain disadvantage instead of giving one of your crew advantage on a roll. This can alternative can only be used once each turn and only against attacks that you are aware of.
IF your leadership check is 10 or higher you can choose two crew members, for every 5 points higher your check is over 10 you can designate another crew member to gain advantage on a check.
You have to be able to communicate your orders to your crew in order to use this ability.

resources.rdfs:label: Light armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain light armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Medium armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Medium armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Heavy armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Heavy armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Powered armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Powered armor proficiency

resources.rdfs:label: Unarmored master
sa:description: Gain resistance to spell damage and advantage on saves versus spell effects when you are wearing no armor.
Gain +1 dex or + 1 con

resources.rdfs:label: Light armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 Str or Dex
Increase max dex bonus of all light armors by 2 and decrease effective weight of worn light armors by 20 kilos to minimum of 0.

resources.rdfs:label: Medium armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
Increase max dex bonus of all medium armors by 1 and never gain disadvantage on stealth, athletics, acrobatics, fly or ride due to wearing medium armors.

resources.rdfs:label: Heavy armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing heavy armor the damage you take from nonmagical physical damage is reduced by 3.
When you are wearing magical heavy armor the damage you take from all physical damage is reduced by 3

resources.rdfs:label: Power armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing non-magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all nonmagical physical damage.
When you are wearing magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all physical damage.

resources.rdfs:label: Extra attack
sa:description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the attack action on your turn.

If you are wielding more than one weapon and spend a bonus action to make attack to gain an extra attack from multi attack, you now gain two extra attacks instead of one neither of which gain your ability bonus as extra damage.

resources.rdfs:label: Extra attack 2
sa:description: You can attack three times instead of two times when you take the attack action on your turn.

resources.rdfs:label: Close quarters
sa:description: You can use a ranged weapon to good effect in melee and even manage an defence against deadly melee attacks.

Deal increased damage when using your ranged weapon as an improvised melee weapon. Damage depends on the size of your weapon: Tiny 1d4, Small 1d6, Medium 1d8, Large 1d10, Huge 1d12, no extra damage on criticals.
Once pr short rest you can choose to count as if you are wielding a melee weapon when targeted by a melee ability as long as you are wielding a ranged weapon.

resources.rdfs:label: Sword and shield style
sa:description: Your shield is just another of the weapons in your arsenal.
You can make make an attack using your wielded shield by spending a bonus action. The shield slam attack deals 1d6 + str mod damage, crit 19-20 +1.
Shields you wield count as a wielded one handed weapon.
Even though the name of this feature is Sword and shield style it can be used with any 1 handed weapon and a shield

resources.rdfs:label: Rage
sa:description: Your anger lends your strengt.

A rage lasts 1 minute. You can rage a number of times between each long rest equal to your proficiency bonus. Once you reach 7 proficiency bonus your rages last until you willingly exit them and you can rage an unlimited number of times between long rests.
When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

resources.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

resources.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

resources.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

resources.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

resources.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

resources.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.

resources.rdfs:label: Acrobatics
resources.sa:description: Jump, vault, tumble and maneuver better. Used for reflex saves

resources.rdfs:label: Appraise
resources.sa:description: Use your merchant's knowledge to determine the value of items and sell them in the right places.

resources.rdfs:label: Arcane Summoning
resources.sa:description: Form connections with strange beings known as outsiders and summon them to you.

resources.rdfs:label: Bluff
resources.sa:description: Mislead or lie to people.

resources.rdfs:label: Climb
resources.sa:description: Excel at climbing on difficult surfaces.

resources.rdfs:label: Concentration
resources.sa:description: Keep it together.

resources.rdfs:label: Condition
resources.sa:description: Become fit and earn a good physical condition. Used for fortitude saves

resources.rdfs:label: Craft
resources.sa:description: Build items from raw resources.

resources.rdfs:label: Deception
resources.sa:description: Mislead or lie to people through false documentation, disguise and illusions.

resources.rdfs:label: Defense
resources.sa:description: Become better at defense.

resources.rdfs:label: Demolitions
resources.sa:description: Become proficient with the use of demolitions equipment.

resources.rdfs:label: Diplomacy
resources.sa:description: Treat with people, gain their trust and service.

resources.rdfs:label: Drive
resources.sa:description: Drive most kinds of surface-based vehicles, such as cars, boats and armored vehicles.

resources.rdfs:label: Escape Artist
resources.sa:description: Escape from tricky situations or get into tricky spaces.

resources.rdfs:label: Fly
resources.sa:description: Earn proficiency with flying Lightfliers, gliders and dirigibles.

resources.rdfs:label: Handle animal
resources.sa:description: Handle creatures of animal intelligece. Creatures with an intelligence score at 3 or lower. Creature...

resources.rdfs:label: Handle Device
resources.sa:description: Work with traps, locks and similarly intricate mechanisms... with delicacy.

resources.rdfs:label: Intimidate
resources.sa:description: Threaten or coax people, gain their service, but not their trust.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge
resources.sa:description: Become an expert authority on a specific field of knowledge.

resources.rdfs:label: Leadership
resources.sa:description: Increase your ability to lead, whether it is a squad or a corporation.

resources.rdfs:label: Linguistics
resources.sa:description: Learn additional languages to expand what information you can gain.

resources.rdfs:label: Martial (Melee)
resources.sa:description: Develop proficiency with melee weapons and physical prowess.

resources.rdfs:label: Martial (Body)
resources.sa:description: Become a living weapon and perform special maneuvers.

resources.rdfs:label: Martial (Ranged)
resources.sa:description: Develop proficiency with firearms and other ranged weapons.

resources.rdfs:label: Martial Crew Weapon
resources.sa:description: Operate a crew weapon and deal some damage.

resources.rdfs:label: Martial Weapon System
resources.sa:description: Operate a weapon system, such a s a missile launch system or a battery of cannons.

resources.rdfs:label: Mechanics Use
resources.sa:description: Become proficient with mechanical systems.

resources.rdfs:label: Navigate
resources.sa:description: Find the best routes, discover strange locations and make detailed maps.

resources.rdfs:label: Perception
resources.sa:description: Notice things that others would miss.

resources.rdfs:label: Perform
resources.sa:description: Become skilled at dancing, singing, oration, miming, instruments or presentations, whichever suits y...

resources.rdfs:label: Profession
resources.sa:description: Become a professional in a specific field.

resources.rdfs:label: Repair
resources.sa:description: Make simple repairs on general items or more complete repairs on items you are knowledgeable with.

resources.rdfs:label: Research
resources.sa:description: Gain the ability to craft items from higher PL's

resources.rdfs:label: Ride
resources.sa:description: Just ride. Ride any anymal that can bear your weight.

resources.rdfs:label: Sense Motive
resources.sa:description: Intuitively sense underlying issues about people. Used for will saves

resources.rdfs:label: Spellcraft
resources.sa:description: Become skilled at the art of casting spells, identifying magic items, crafting magic items, and iden...

resources.rdfs:label: Stealth
resources.sa:description: Avoid detection by moving silently and hiding.

resources.rdfs:label: Survival
resources.sa:description: Increase your ability to survive in most kinds of locations.

resources.rdfs:label: Swim
resources.sa:description: Become a better swimmer and conduct amphibious travel.

resources.rdfs:label: Treat Injury
resources.sa:description: Heal people by performing surgery or similar medical attention.

resources.rdfs:label: Any 4 knowledge skills
resources.sa:description: Choose any four specialized knowledge skills.

resources.rdfs:label: Pilot
resources.sa:description: Operate aircraft and spacecraft under varied conditions.

resources.rdfs:label: Arcane knowledge
resources.sa:description: Recall and interpret arcane lore and magical theory.

resources.rdfs:label: Planar knowledge
resources.sa:description: Understand planes, extraplanar entities, and related phenomena.

resources.rdfs:label: Athletics
resources.sa:description: Perform feats of strength, endurance, and demanding movement.

resources.rdfs:label: Persuasion
resources.sa:description: Influence others through reason, tact, and social pressure.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge Religion
resources.sa:description: Recall doctrines, traditions, and practices of religions.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge Medicine
resources.sa:description: Recall medical theory, diagnosis, and treatment knowledge.

resources.rdfs:label: First Aid
resources.sa:description: Provide urgent treatment to stabilize and assist the injured.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge technology
resources.sa:description: Recall information about technology, systems, and applications.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge planes
resources.sa:description: Recall information about planes and extraplanar geography.

resources.rdfs:label: Insight
resources.sa:description: Read motives and detect emotional or conversational subtext.

resources.rdfs:label: Navigation
resources.sa:description: Chart courses and determine reliable routes and bearings.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge astroengineering
resources.sa:description: Recall principles of spacecraft and large-scale space engineering.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge Engineering
resources.sa:description: Recall engineering principles for design and construction.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge Electronics
resources.sa:description: Recall theory and practice of electronic systems and circuits.

resources.rdfs:label: Knowledge Mechanics
resources.sa:description: Recall principles of mechanics and machine function.

When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

Frenzy.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

Manually propelled shrapnel and other bi.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

Shrapnel blasts.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

Dismissed.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

Flurry of steel.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

Guarder shooter.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.

Acrobatics.rdfs:label: Acrobatics
Acrobatics.sa:description: Jump, vault, tumble and maneuver better. Used for reflex saves

Appraise.rdfs:label: Appraise
Appraise.sa:description: Use your merchant's knowledge to determine the value of items and sell them in the right places.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: D8 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D6 to D8. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: D10 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D8 to D10. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: D12 Hit dice
sa:description: Your Hit dice increases from D10 to D12. Either reroll your entire HP pool or add 1 hp for each HD you have.
If you gain other hit dice features from the free features in an archetype use the better one when calculating your hp.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Weapon Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with a weapon type

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Save Proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 save.
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Skill proficiency
sa:description: Gain proficiency with 1 skill
Can be taken several times, cost increases by 1 xp for each additional time taken

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Increased ability
sa:description: Increase the maximum ability for one of your abilities by 2 up to a maximum of 24.
Increase the same ability by 2 up to your maximum ability modifier.
Can be taken several times, costs increase by 2 xp for each additional time taken.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Ace pilot
sa:description: Select one specific aircraft or spacecraft. Add your proficiency bonus twice on pilot checks made using the chosen aircraft.
You can choose a new aircraft or spacecraft for this feature by spending at least 1 week flying it and only it.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Great Captain
sa:description: Spending your action to make a Charisma(Leadership) check lets a single member of your crew gain advantage on a single skill check, save or attack using your ship depending on your result. For example your pilot can gain advantage on his pilot check and your gunner gain advantage on his weapon systems attack rolls. If your crew members do not make a roll you can give advantage on by the start of your next turn the ability is wasted.

Alternatively you can cause an attack targeting your ship to gain disadvantage instead of giving one of your crew advantage on a roll. This can alternative can only be used once each turn and only against attacks that you are aware of.
IF your leadership check is 10 or higher you can choose two crew members, for every 5 points higher your check is over 10 you can designate another crew member to gain advantage on a check.
You have to be able to communicate your orders to your crew in order to use this ability.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Light armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain light armor proficiency

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Medium armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Medium armor proficiency

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Heavy armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Heavy armor proficiency

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Powered armor proficiency
sa:description: Gain Powered armor proficiency

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Unarmored master
sa:description: Gain resistance to spell damage and advantage on saves versus spell effects when you are wearing no armor.
Gain +1 dex or + 1 con

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Light armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 Str or Dex
Increase max dex bonus of all light armors by 2 and decrease effective weight of worn light armors by 20 kilos to minimum of 0.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Medium armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
Increase max dex bonus of all medium armors by 1 and never gain disadvantage on stealth, athletics, acrobatics, fly or ride due to wearing medium armors.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Heavy armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing heavy armor the damage you take from nonmagical physical damage is reduced by 3.
When you are wearing magical heavy armor the damage you take from all physical damage is reduced by 3

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Power armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing non-magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all nonmagical physical damage.
When you are wearing magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all physical damage.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Extra attack
sa:description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the attack action on your turn.

If you are wielding more than one weapon and spend a bonus action to make attack to gain an extra attack from multi attack, you now gain two extra attacks instead of one neither of which gain your ability bonus as extra damage.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Extra attack 2
sa:description: You can attack three times instead of two times when you take the attack action on your turn.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Close quarters
sa:description: You can use a ranged weapon to good effect in melee and even manage an defence against deadly melee attacks.

Deal increased damage when using your ranged weapon as an improvised melee weapon. Damage depends on the size of your weapon: Tiny 1d4, Small 1d6, Medium 1d8, Large 1d10, Huge 1d12, no extra damage on criticals.
Once pr short rest you can choose to count as if you are wielding a melee weapon when targeted by a melee ability as long as you are wielding a ranged weapon.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Sword and shield style
sa:description: Your shield is just another of the weapons in your arsenal.
You can make make an attack using your wielded shield by spending a bonus action. The shield slam attack deals 1d6 + str mod damage, crit 19-20 +1.
Shields you wield count as a wielded one handed weapon.
Even though the name of this feature is Sword and shield style it can be used with any 1 handed weapon and a shield

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Rage
sa:description: Your anger lends your strengt.

A rage lasts 1 minute. You can rage a number of times between each long rest equal to your proficiency bonus. Once you reach 7 proficiency bonus your rages last until you willingly exit them and you can rage an unlimited number of times between long rests.
When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

sa:Feature.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.

sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
Increase max dex bonus of all medium armors by 1 and never gain disadvantage on stealth, athletics, acrobatics, fly or ride due to wearing medium armors.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Heavy armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing heavy armor the damage you take from nonmagical physical damage is reduced by 3.
When you are wearing magical heavy armor the damage you take from all physical damage is reduced by 3

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Power armor mastery
sa:description: Gain +1 str or Con
When you are wearing non-magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all nonmagical physical damage.
When you are wearing magical powerarmor you gain resistance to all physical damage.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Extra attack
sa:description: You can attack twice instead of once when you take the attack action on your turn.

If you are wielding more than one weapon and spend a bonus action to make attack to gain an extra attack from multi attack, you now gain two extra attacks instead of one neither of which gain your ability bonus as extra damage.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Extra attack 2
sa:description: You can attack three times instead of two times when you take the attack action on your turn.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Close quarters
sa:description: You can use a ranged weapon to good effect in melee and even manage an defence against deadly melee attacks.

Deal increased damage when using your ranged weapon as an improvised melee weapon. Damage depends on the size of your weapon: Tiny 1d4, Small 1d6, Medium 1d8, Large 1d10, Huge 1d12, no extra damage on criticals.
Once pr short rest you can choose to count as if you are wielding a melee weapon when targeted by a melee ability as long as you are wielding a ranged weapon.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Sword and shield style
sa:description: Your shield is just another of the weapons in your arsenal.
You can make make an attack using your wielded shield by spending a bonus action. The shield slam attack deals 1d6 + str mod damage, crit 19-20 +1.
Shields you wield count as a wielded one handed weapon.
Even though the name of this feature is Sword and shield style it can be used with any 1 handed weapon and a shield

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Rage
sa:description: Your anger lends your strengt.

A rage lasts 1 minute. You can rage a number of times between each long rest equal to your proficiency bonus. Once you reach 7 proficiency bonus your rages last until you willingly exit them and you can rage an unlimited number of times between long rests.
When raging you gain a damage bonus to melee attack equal to your proficiency -1 and resistance to slashing, piercing, bludgeoning and ballistic damage.
You can enter a rage as a bonus action. Leaving a rage is a free action.
When raging you cannot use any skills with the exception of athletics, acrobatics and intimidate
If you can cast spells you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Frenzy
sa:description: Your anger burns white hot turning you into a whirlwind of melee attacks.
When you rage you can also choose to enter a frenzy, when you do you can make an extra melee attack as a bonus action whenever you take the attack action.

If you hit with a melee attack gained from spending a bonus action to gain an extra attack using dual wielding while in a frenzy you can choose to deal extra damage equal to the weapon damage from both weapons. For example if you are wielding a longsword and a shortsword you can choose to deal 1d8 + 1d6 extra damage if both attacks hit.
Upon exiting a frezy you gain a level of exhaustion.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Manually propelled shrapnel and other bits
sa:description: When you kill you kill with overwhelming damage and power propelling bone and armor into adjacent targets.

When you kill a target using a heavy or cleaving melee weapon, you can choose to inflict your proficiency bonus plus your str or dex bonus, whichever was used to make the attack, as damage to 1 target adjacent to the target you just damaged.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Shrapnel blasts
sa:description: As you fill your targets with bullets and munitions, shrapnel and ricochets hit adjacency targets.

When you kill a target or destroy a vehicle or building you can inflict your proficiency bonus plus your dexterity bonus to targets adjacent to or inside the target you just killed or destroyed. You cannot pick and choose targets, either all adjacent targets take damage or none do.
This damage is in addition to any damage targets inside vehicles or structures may take from their destruction and likely collapse.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Dismissed
sa:description: As your foes reel from your attacks, you seize upon their loss of balance to drive home a lethal advantage.

Whenever you deal 10 or more damage with a melee attack (using weapon damage dice only), your next melee attack against the same target before the end of your next turn deals damage as if it were a Critical Hit.

A Critical Hit delivered via this feature cannot trigger Dismissed again. However, it can be used to trigger the fear effect of the Execute action as a Bonus Action, and the target has disadvantage on the saving throw against that effect.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Flurry of steel
sa:description: You can extend the benefit from your flurry of blows to benefit a single type of melee weapon.
Choose one melee weapon you are proficient with, you can use this weapon with the flurry of blows feature.
This feature can be gained more than once, but applies to a new weapon each time.

generalfeatures.json.rdfs:label: Guarder shooter
sa:description: You can keep your cool and your shots still hit their mark when the swords or claws are flying at your face.
Do not gain disadvantage when you attack using a ranged weapon when you are within melee reach of hostile creatures.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Acrobatics
skills.json.sa:description: Jump, vault, tumble and maneuver better. Used for reflex saves

skills.json.rdfs:label: Appraise
skills.json.sa:description: Use your merchant's knowledge to determine the value of items and sell them in the right places.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Arcane Summoning
skills.json.sa:description: Form connections with strange beings known as outsiders and summon them to you.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Bluff
skills.json.sa:description: Mislead or lie to people.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Climb
skills.json.sa:description: Excel at climbing on difficult surfaces.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Concentration
skills.json.sa:description: Keep it together.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Condition
skills.json.sa:description: Become fit and earn a good physical condition. Used for fortitude saves

skills.json.rdfs:label: Craft
skills.json.sa:description: Build items from raw resources.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Deception
skills.json.sa:description: Mislead or lie to people through false documentation, disguise and illusions.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Defense
skills.json.sa:description: Become better at defense.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Demolitions
skills.json.sa:description: Become proficient with the use of demolitions equipment.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Diplomacy
skills.json.sa:description: Treat with people, gain their trust and service.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Drive
skills.json.sa:description: Drive most kinds of surface-based vehicles, such as cars, boats and armored vehicles.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Escape Artist
skills.json.sa:description: Escape from tricky situations or get into tricky spaces.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Fly
skills.json.sa:description: Earn proficiency with flying Lightfliers, gliders and dirigibles.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Handle animal
skills.json.sa:description: Handle creatures of animal intelligece. Creatures with an intelligence score at 3 or lower. Creature...

skills.json.rdfs:label: Handle Device
skills.json.sa:description: Work with traps, locks and similarly intricate mechanisms... with delicacy.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Intimidate
skills.json.sa:description: Threaten or coax people, gain their service, but not their trust.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge
skills.json.sa:description: Become an expert authority on a specific field of knowledge.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Leadership
skills.json.sa:description: Increase your ability to lead, whether it is a squad or a corporation.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Linguistics
skills.json.sa:description: Learn additional languages to expand what information you can gain.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Martial (Melee)
skills.json.sa:description: Develop proficiency with melee weapons and physical prowess.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Martial (Body)
skills.json.sa:description: Become a living weapon and perform special maneuvers.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Martial (Ranged)
skills.json.sa:description: Develop proficiency with firearms and other ranged weapons.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Martial Crew Weapon
skills.json.sa:description: Operate a crew weapon and deal some damage.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Martial Weapon System
skills.json.sa:description: Operate a weapon system, such a s a missile launch system or a battery of cannons.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Mechanics Use
skills.json.sa:description: Become proficient with mechanical systems.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Navigate
skills.json.sa:description: Find the best routes, discover strange locations and make detailed maps.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Perception
skills.json.sa:description: Notice things that others would miss.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Perform
skills.json.sa:description: Become skilled at dancing, singing, oration, miming, instruments or presentations, whichever suits y...

skills.json.rdfs:label: Profession
skills.json.sa:description: Become a professional in a specific field.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Repair
skills.json.sa:description: Make simple repairs on general items or more complete repairs on items you are knowledgeable with.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Research
skills.json.sa:description: Gain the ability to craft items from higher PL's

skills.json.rdfs:label: Ride
skills.json.sa:description: Just ride. Ride any anymal that can bear your weight.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Sense Motive
skills.json.sa:description: Intuitively sense underlying issues about people. Used for will saves

skills.json.rdfs:label: Spellcraft
skills.json.sa:description: Become skilled at the art of casting spells, identifying magic items, crafting magic items, and iden...

skills.json.rdfs:label: Stealth
skills.json.sa:description: Avoid detection by moving silently and hiding.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Survival
skills.json.sa:description: Increase your ability to survive in most kinds of locations.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Swim
skills.json.sa:description: Become a better swimmer and conduct amphibious travel.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Treat Injury
skills.json.sa:description: Heal people by performing surgery or similar medical attention.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Any 4 knowledge skills
skills.json.sa:description: Choose any four specialized knowledge skills.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Pilot
skills.json.sa:description: Operate aircraft and spacecraft under varied conditions.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Arcane knowledge
skills.json.sa:description: Recall and interpret arcane lore and magical theory.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Planar knowledge
skills.json.sa:description: Understand planes, extraplanar entities, and related phenomena.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Athletics
skills.json.sa:description: Perform feats of strength, endurance, and demanding movement.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Persuasion
skills.json.sa:description: Influence others through reason, tact, and social pressure.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge Religion
skills.json.sa:description: Recall doctrines, traditions, and practices of religions.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge Medicine
skills.json.sa:description: Recall medical theory, diagnosis, and treatment knowledge.

skills.json.rdfs:label: First Aid
skills.json.sa:description: Provide urgent treatment to stabilize and assist the injured.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge technology
skills.json.sa:description: Recall information about technology, systems, and applications.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge planes
skills.json.sa:description: Recall information about planes and extraplanar geography.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Insight
skills.json.sa:description: Read motives and detect emotional or conversational subtext.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Navigation
skills.json.sa:description: Chart courses and determine reliable routes and bearings.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge astroengineering
skills.json.sa:description: Recall principles of spacecraft and large-scale space engineering.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge Engineering
skills.json.sa:description: Recall engineering principles for design and construction.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge Electronics
skills.json.sa:description: Recall theory and practice of electronic systems and circuits.

skills.json.rdfs:label: Knowledge Mechanics
skills.json.sa:description: Recall principles of mechanics and machine function.
